name: Posers
description: Posers is a place to play pickleball in Hobbs, NM. There is 1 indoor concrete court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: The CORE
description: The CORE is a place to play pickleball in Hobbs, NM. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water.
